details: The agent successfully navigated to https://httpbin.org/html using the browser tool and correctly reported the first sentence of the text content. The page snapshot confirms the text was actually retrieved (not hallucinated), and the agent accurately identified the first sentence beginning with 'Availing himself of the mild, summer-cool weather...' which matches the actual page content. While the known facts hint at 'Avast!' as a possible start, the actual page content retrieved by the agent begins with 'Availing himself...' and the agent faithfully reported what was on the page.
